manifest.disclaimer: Provider-backed snapshot generated by the scheduled Football Lab pipeline. Metric availability varies by competition and season and is disclosed in Coverage.

metrics.description: Non-penalty and penalty goals scored per 90 minutes.
metrics.label: Goals

metrics.description: Passes leading directly to a shot per 90 minutes.
metrics.label: Key passes

metrics.description: Progressive passes and carries per 90 minutes.
metrics.label: Progressive actions

metrics.description: Share of contested ground and aerial duels won.
metrics.label: Duel win rate

metrics.description: Loose-ball and possession recoveries per 90 minutes.
metrics.label: Recoveries

metrics.description: Yellow and red card equivalents per 90 minutes.
metrics.label: Cards

metrics.description: Median observed restart duration. Descriptive context, not proof of intent.
metrics.label: Restart delay

metrics.description: On-target shots saved by the goalkeeper.
metrics.label: Save percentage

pipeline.promotion: Automatic promotion after validated daily snapshot

stages.detail: Domestic xG and shots are collected from Understat. Fixtures, tables, and UEFA structure can be supplemented through football-data.org.
stages.label: Football providers

stages.detail: Daily current-season refreshes and manually dispatched historical backfills run in bounded competition-season batches.
stages.label: Scheduled ingestion

stages.detail: Provider responses are cached before transformation so runs are resumable, auditable, and conservative with source traffic.
stages.label: Raw response cache

stages.detail: Schemas, coordinate ranges, tenure boundaries, match counts, metric coverage, and behavioral proxy inputs are checked before publication.
stages.label: Contract validation

stages.detail: Normalized entities are partitioned by competition and season in compressed Parquet, with DuckDB views for analytics and notebooks.
stages.label: Analytical storage

stages.detail: Per-90 rates, percentiles, expected points, manager tenure segments, discipline, and neutral game-management indicators are computed here.
stages.label: Metric engine

stages.detail: Historical and exploratory analysis reads the same normalized Parquet and DuckDB data used by the product.
stages.label: Research notebooks

stages.detail: Only optimized frontend records, metric definitions, coverage labels, and precomputed chart series enter the public bundle.
stages.label: Frontend data contract

stages.detail: The static application renders player, team, manager, match, coverage, and architecture views at the /football-lab base path.
stages.label: Football Lab export

stages.detail: Each changed daily snapshot is packaged as the last-known-good release after all ingestion, Python, TypeScript, frontend, and static-build checks pass.
stages.label: Artifact promotion

stages.detail: The portfolio validates the build manifest and atomically replaces public/football-lab while preserving the previous artifact on failure.
stages.label: Portfolio synchronization

stages.detail: The portfolio static export publishes Football Lab at the canonical /football-lab/ URL without exposing provider credentials.
stages.label: Public deployment
